page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7nex.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps.

This resource profile is designed for workloads requiring consistent, dedicated CPU performance and balanced memory allocation. Suitable applications include general-purpose web serving, application servers, enterprise databases, and containerized microservices that benefit from dedicated physical cores and high network throughput without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
